ingredients_text: 33% Sweet Chilli Sauce (Water, Pineapple, Red Pepper, Yellow Pepper, Cornflour, Light Soy Sauce [Water, _Soya_ Bean, Salt, _Wheat_ Flour], Garlic, Ginger, Red Chillies, Tomato Paste, Sweetener: Steviol Glycosides; Lemon Juice form Concentrate, White Wine Vinegar, Molasses, Salt, Paprika Extract, Red Chillies), 33% Vegetable Mix (11% Edamame Beans (_Soya_), 11% Carrot, 11% Green Cabbage), 18% Butternut Squash Spaghetti, 16% Cooked Chicken Breast Pieces (Chicken Breast, Salt)
